columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Date and time when the event was recorded

columns.name: ReportId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the event

columns.name: ActionType
columns.description: Type of activity that triggered the event

columns.name: AzureResourceId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the Azure resource associated with the process

columns.name: AwsResourceName
columns.description: Unique identifier specific to Amazon Web Services devices, containing the Amazon resource name

columns.name: GcpFullResourceName
columns.description: Unique identifier specific to Google Cloud Platform devices, containing a combination of zone and ID for GCP

columns.name: KubernetesResource
columns.description: Unique identifier for the Kubernetes resource that includes the namespace, resource type and name

columns.name: KubernetesNamespace
columns.description: The Kubernetes namespace name

columns.name: KubernetesPodName
columns.description: The Kubernetes pod name

columns.name: ContainerName
columns.description: Name of the container in Kubernetes or another runtime environment

columns.name: ContainerId
columns.description: The container identifier in Kubernetes or another runtime environment

columns.name: ImageName
columns.description: Container image name or ID

columns.name: ProcessName
columns.description: The name of the process that initiated the DNS query

columns.name: ProcessId
columns.description: Process ID that initiated the DNS query

columns.name: DnsEventType
columns.description: Type of event associated with DNS operation (for example, query)

columns.name: DnsEventSubType
columns.description: Either request or response

columns.name: DnsQuery
columns.description: The domain that needs to be resolved

columns.name: DnsQueryTypeName
columns.description: The DNS resource record type name as defined by the Internet Assigned Numbers Authority (IANA)

columns.name: DnsResponseCodeName
columns.description: The DNS response code name as defined by the Internet Assigned Numbers Authority (IANA).

columns.name: DnsNetworkDuration
columns.description: The DNS request duration in milliseconds

columns.name: TransactionIdHex
columns.description: The DNS unique hex transaction ID

columns.name: AdditionalFields
columns.description: Additional information about the entity or event
